title: Add Subitems as dynamic values in a Doc
excerpt:
Hello everyone! 
Newbie here, I noticed that when I’m creating a doc I can add dynamic values, but when I try to add subitems as dynamic values it always show Novalues, and I do have subitems, does anyone know something …

posts.author: Chko23 (Sergio Alberto Martinez Jaime)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone!

Newbie here, I noticed that when I’m creating a doc I can add dynamic values, but when I try to add subitems as dynamic values it always show Novalues, and I do have subitems, does anyone know something about this?

posts.author: mollieru (Mollie R.)
posts.cookedHtml: having the same issue and would love to be able to add dynamic values for subitems!

posts.author: Aulysius_Corner_Rep (Mateusz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

Looking for a way to add subitems as dynamic values in a Doc? We’ve got the answer in the first episode of Aulysius Corner!

Our monday com specialist tackle this specific topic at the [04:56] mark in the video.

We cover many other monday com questions in this episode, so if you have anything else on your mind, be sure to check it out:

  1. Go to Youtube
  2. Search → Aulysius Corner - Providing answers to monday com Community
  3. Get your problem solved!

Hope this helps!

~ Aulysius Corner Rep
